title: begonia glandulosa
intro: Begonia glandulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, characterized by its white or yellow flowers and hairy, glandular leaves. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Begonia glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams for its medicinal and health benefits.
